title: Publish CCP v0.1 consultation draft and working CLI
problem_statement: CCP needs an executable core so the protocol is testable and locally usable.
desired_end_state: The repo contains a consultation draft, schemas, examples, and a working CLI for local CCP workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Schemas exist for all four core object types
CLI can init, new, validate, render, and index a CCP repo
constraints: Do not make Foundry-specific behavior normative
